transcript.text: How's it going, man?
Good to see you.
How are you?
Really good.
I'm sure.
I'm sure.
Well, no, good to see you.
Thanks for taking the time.
Wanted to sync as followed up with, I know we spent a bunch of time with the data, some more with your customers and had a discussion on yesterday.
So I wanted to follow up with you on kind of where process side on our end.
Sounds good.
So I'm really, I mean, you know, love all the things about the business, just not only the customer feedback, but the momentum and not only the top line, but also the efficiency of the business.
And I think that I've really enjoyed our discussions with you.
Unfortunately, this round is not going to be a fit for us.
The biggest debate we're having and like where we just don't have the conviction to go in yet is just around how this kind of agency like model evolves in this end market over time.
And it's not necessarily like that it can't succeed.
Because it most certainly can.
It's really about what does the market look like in two or three years, just given we're in this like kind of AI air pocket explosion.
And it's not something, it's not that we don't think that you're not going to be successful.
It's just, we just don't know.
And for us, like, obviously being a really small team and not doing a ton of investments, we want to have like full 100% conviction when we're kind of like diving into something.
And that was the debate we're having.
And we just don't have that at this time.
And so I wanted to share that with you live.
I'm very excited about the business and looking forward to staying in touch and want to continue to get our portfolio companies and others working with you guys.
And the success that other companies that we have have seen has been great.
So anyway, I'll pause there.
But I just wanted to, I want to share that with you and appreciate you.
Including us in this process as well.
Yeah, no, absolutely.
And totally, totally get it.
Like, that's why we've been super upfront from the beginning.

Like, yeah, a business for that looks the same as other businesses out there and pattern matching, you know, and it's part of like, one of the reasons we weren't even going to raise this right now or ever again, most likely, like, we'll be profitable in two months.
And so we're like, you know, like, there's so much amount happening right now and our business is exploding.
But also, like, we understand, like, there's a lot we're also building and I think things will kind of on the tech side, the picture will look a lot different even like a month or two from now.
And so, like, for us, like, it's super helpful to, like, that's why we're running this, like, very tight process until the end of this week.
A couple more partnership meetings and then, like, we'll decide, like, what to do at the end of the week and get back to work, you know?
Yeah, no, cool.
And yeah, for me, it's like, your comment around pattern matching, it's...
Less about that, only because the unit economics are so strong.
Like, we don't, like, I personally, and I think my partners would feel similarly, like, we don't put kind of every business model in the same vein.
It's really more about, like, how, I'm not worried about the next year.
I think you're going to, you know, hit your numbers and continue to grow.
It's really, like, as the AI air pocket kind of not fills up, but, like, becomes more steady state, what does this model look like?
And the progress against the business, not just the business model, but, like, the engagement processes, like, how, and then, and then, honestly, we had this other debate, too.

And I'll just be candid with you around, like, hey, what about, like, how do we think about AI tooling that companies buy to make themselves successful versus growthx, which is money that they spend outside the company to make them successful for the, for different goals.
But.
Somewhat concentric circles crossover.
So that was like another part of the debate that we had.
So anyway, it's like, that's super helpful.
I don't know.
I do think you're going to continue to be very successful.
And I'm fired up about it.
was just like, when we have, like I said, we just want to have full conviction on what we believe is the right approach.
we don't for whatever, you know, I'm not saying we have the right answer.
We just don't have that like unified view.
At the moment.
So that was all.
So anyway, I really appreciate it.
And I appreciate you also giving the insight and it kind of helps us quite a bit as far as like understanding how people are thinking, how they're analyzing it.
This process is kind of weird because like you, you kind of like open up your entire business and sometimes get feedback as well.
Right.
And so I appreciate that.
That means a lot to us as well.
And continuing the relationship long term.
Yeah, even if it's just like...
Sending us referrals or businesses or whatever, you know, so I appreciate it, man.
Cool.
Well, awesome.
Thank you, Marcel.
And congrats on all the progress.
I'm looking forward to staying in touch.
And if there's any portfolio companies, I will send them your way.
Sounds good, man.
All right.
Thank you.
Yeah.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on Meritech's investment decision regarding GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Meritech decided not to invest in GrowthX, citing uncertainty about the agency model's evolution in the AI market](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [GrowthX's strong unit economics and customer success were acknowledged, but concerns about long-term market dynamics prevailed](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX expects to be profitable in 2 months and is running a tight fundraising process ending this week](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in maintaining a positive relationship for potential future collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

## Topics

### Meritech's Investment Decision

  - [Meritech declined to invest in GrowthX despite positive impressions of the business](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Key reasons for the decision:](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
      - [Uncertainty about the agency model's evolution in the AI market over 2-3 years](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Lack of full conviction required for Meritech's small team and selective investment approach](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
      - [Debates around AI tooling vs. external services for company success](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

### GrowthX's Business Performance

  - [Strong customer feedback and business momentum noted](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Impressive top-line growth and efficiency metrics](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Unit economics described as "so strong" by Alex](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Marcel mentioned the business is "exploding" with significant developments](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### Fundraising Process and Company Outlook

  - [GrowthX running a "very tight process" ending this week](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Company expects to be profitable in 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Marcel indicated they might not raise funds again, given their trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Significant tech developments expected in the next 1-2 months, potentially changing the company's profile](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Market Dynamics and AI Impact

  - [Meritech's concerns centered on the "AI air pocket explosion" and its long-term effects](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Debates about how companies will allocate resources between AI tooling and external services like GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Uncertainty about the competitive landscape in 2-3 years as AI becomes more established](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

### Relationship and Future Collaboration

  - [Both parties expressed interest in maintaining a positive relationship](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Alex offered to refer portfolio companies to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Marcel appreciated the feedback and insights from the process](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conclude their fundraising process by the end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Meritech to potentially refer portfolio companies to GrowthX for services](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Both parties to stay in touch and monitor GrowthX's progress](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
